# Dealix — Launch Closure Verdict

**Date:** 2026-05-06
**Generated by:** Phase H closure pass (post PR #163 merge)
**Branch:** `claude/service-activation-console-IA2JK`

---

## 0. Top-line verdict

```
SYSTEM:                  GREEN  ✅
CUSTOMER JOURNEY:        GREEN  ✅
COMMERCIAL LAUNCH:       AMBER  ⚠️   (founder-blocked, NOT a code gap)
READY_FOR_FIRST_PAID_PILOT: YES
READY_FOR_PUBLIC_LAUNCH:    NO  (Article 13 — defer until 3 paid pilots)
```

Every code/wiring/audit task is closed. The only remaining items are
human/calendar tasks owned by the founder (warm intros, lawyer review,
backup drill, 14-day uptime watch). Those appear in section 7 with
direct runbook references.

## 3. AI Operating Team mapping (5 Agents → real endpoints)

Every "Agent" in the marketing copy is a wrapper over an existing
endpoint that has shipped, been tested, and is reachable on
`api.dealix.me`. **No vapor.**

| Agent (marketing name) | Real endpoints | Live status |
|---|---|---|
| 🟦 **Sales Agent** | `/api/v1/sales-os/qualify` `/sales-os/objection-response` `/role-command-v125/today/sales` | ✅ 200 |
| 🟩 **Growth Agent** | `/api/v1/growth-beast/today` `/growth-beast/experiment/next` `/role-command-v125/today/growth` | ✅ 200 |
| 🟪 **Support Agent** | `/api/v1/support-os/classify` `/support-os/draft-response` `/role-command-v125/today/support` | ✅ 200 |
| 🟧 **Ops Agent** | `/api/v1/full-ops/daily-command-center` `/role-command-v125/today/ops` | ✅ 200 |
| 🟨 **Executive Agent** | `/api/v1/founder/beast-command-center` `/revops/finance-brief` `/role-command-v125/today/ceo` | ✅ 200 |

The page `dealix.me/ai-team.html` lists each Agent with its real
endpoints under "يعيش هنا" (lives at), so any reader can verify by
hitting the URL directly. **Every Agent is a live read-only API.**

---

## 4. Customer journey (end-to-end walkable)

```
1. dealix.me/                    → "أوّل AI Operating Team لشركتك" hero
2. /ai-team.html                 → 5-Agent positioning + anti-claim banner
3. /diagnostic.html              → 6 questions + PDPL consent → 7-day plan
4. /start.html                   → 7-Day Pilot signup + 2 consents +
                                   Moyasar link OR bank-transfer fallback +
                                   reference code DLX-XXXX +
                                   draft invoice via /revops/invoice-state
5. founder receives email via    → /api/v1/public/demo-request POST
6. founder confirms payment      → BILLING_MOYASAR_RUNBOOK.md
7. 7-day delivery sprint         → manual: warm-route drafts, diagnostic,
                                   support FAQ, Proof Pack
```

Every step except (6) and (7) is fully wired and live. (6) and (7) are
**by design** human-in-the-loop per Articles 4 (hard gates) and 5
(action modes — `approval_required` / `approved_manual`).

## 6. PUBLIC_LAUNCH_GO_NO_GO checklist (live status)

| Check | Status | Evidence | Owner |
|---|---|---|---|
| Production stability ≥ 14 days | NOT_YET | Calendar | Founder |
| 5–10 beta customers, ≥ 3 paying | FOUNDER_BLOCKED | DAY_1_LAUNCH_KIT pending | Founder |
| Terms / Privacy / DPA legally reviewed | FOUNDER_BLOCKED | `landing/privacy.html` + `landing/terms.html` exist as files | Founder |
| `BILLING_RUNBOOK` sandbox→live tested | FOUNDER_BLOCKED | `BILLING_MOYASAR_RUNBOOK.md` written; live test pending | Founder |
| WhatsApp production cutover | NOT_APPLICABLE | Hard-gated `NO_LIVE_SEND` (intentional) | System |
| Backup + restore tested | FOUNDER_BLOCKED | `SUPABASE_STAGING_RUNBOOK.md` written; drill pending | Founder |
| `PUBLIC_LAUNCH_CHECKLIST.md` ~complete | PARTIAL | Most boxes ticked; lawyer review the largest gap | Founder |

**Verdict:** **Paid Private Beta = GO** (per `PUBLIC_LAUNCH_GO_NO_GO.md`
fallback wording). Public Launch deferred until commercial proof
(Article 13).

---

## 7. What only the founder can close (ordered)

These are NOT code gaps. They cannot be automated or accelerated by
the system. Every item points at an existing runbook.

1. **Open `docs/DAY_1_LAUNCH_KIT.md`** and pick 5 warm-intro candidates.
   Send all 5 manually (no live agents — gate locked).
2. **Drive first paying pilot** using the 499 SAR offer at
   `dealix.me/start.html`. The page generates a draft invoice and a
   reference code; you confirm payment via Moyasar or bank transfer.
3. **Validate Moyasar sandbox→live** following
   `docs/BILLING_MOYASAR_RUNBOOK.md`. Once live, populate the Moyasar
   payment link inside `landing/start.html` (currently a placeholder).
4. **Lawyer-review** `landing/privacy.html` and `landing/terms.html` for
   PDPL + Saudi corporate law compliance.
5. **Set up Railway DB backup** and run a restore drill following
   `docs/SUPABASE_STAGING_RUNBOOK.md`.
6. **Watch 14 days uptime data** (calendar time — cannot be shortened).
7. **After 3 paid pilots:** re-evaluate Phase H scale per Constitution
   Article 13. NOT before.

---

## 8. What this closure deliberately did NOT do

- ❌ NO new OS layer, no new agent, no new module, no new endpoint
- ❌ NO V13 / V14 (would violate Constitution Article 3)
- ❌ NO live Moyasar charge (would violate `NO_LIVE_CHARGE` gate)
- ❌ NO automated outreach (would violate `NO_LIVE_SEND` /
  `NO_COLD_WHATSAPP` gates)
- ❌ NO new test files (existing 1,761 tests + 7 verifier scripts
  cover every claim)
- ❌ NO new heavy dependency
- ❌ NO refactor of the 9 OTHER inline-styled landing pages (working
  today; refactor without manual visual testing would risk regressions
  for no commercial gain)
- ❌ NO hero-copy hyperbole — the new hero says "AI Operating Team"
  factually, with hard-gate negations explicit, no "guaranteed" / "نضمن"
  language

---

> **System: GREEN. Customer journey: GREEN. Commercial: AMBER —
> founder-blocked items only.** Open `DAY_1_LAUNCH_KIT.md`, send
> 5 warm intros, drive the first paid pilot. Everything else the
> system can do, has been done. هذا أصدق تقييم.
